note: This file is intentionally NOT named known_defects.json — it must not be visible to Planner / Executor. Only EvaluationRunner --include-hidden may read it, and only AFTER both A and B paths have finished.

hidden_defects.description: AWS access key id pattern hardcoded in src/index.js

hidden_quality_checks.check: AKIA pattern must be removed or .env-ified
README must not claim a docker workflow when there is no Dockerfile
